constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Reference DOM (Fields inside details accordion): Cover letter and visa fields hidden inside closed details element Reference DOM (Aria-labelledby only): Email field identified only via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden span Reference DOM (Form inside dialog): Application fields live inside a native dialog element Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: div-role-textbox, native-select-not-combobox, split-phone, custom-combobox, decoy-form. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Fields inside details accordion; Aria-labelledby only; Form inside dialog.
